k9_system_recap: >>> RECAP: In the dream plane, three memory fragments were reconstructed: The last campfire, the battle against Nihilus, and Aldric's sacrifice. The truth was revealed - A.R.I.A. is a fragment of Aldric's consciousness, created in the moment of his death through the time rift. The mirror fight against the shadow self was won. Nihilus identified as 'Devourer of Times.'
k9_system_dark_energy: >>> WARNING: Massive dark energy signature detected. Category: Destructive. Strength exceeds all previous readings threefold. Eldenrath is the target. Immediate evacuation recommended.
k9_protag_fire: What the... The entire village is burning! Fire everywhere!
k9_aria_screams: The screams... So many people. The eastern side is already lost. We have to act, NOW!
k9_kael_attack: These creatures are coming out of nowhere! Shadow beasts, everywhere! Who's behind this?!
k9_luna_wounded: Please... hold on... I can't heal everyone at once... There are too many wounded...
k9_system_rescue: >>> FATE CHOICE DETECTED. All four companions are in mortal danger. Time permits only one rescue. Who takes priority?
k9_choice_rescue_aria: Aria! She's surrounded - I have to get to her!
k9_choice_rescue_kael: Kael is trapped! I'm getting him out!
k9_choice_rescue_aldric: Aldric's tower is burning! He can't get out!
k9_choice_rescue_luna: Luna needs protection - without her, the wounded will die!
k9_aria_saved: You... you came. Through the fire. For me.
k9_aria_fight_back: Then we fight. Side by side. These creatures will pay the price.
k9_protag_save_kael: Kael! Where are you?! I'm getting you out of here!
k9_kael_trapped: Over here! The damn roof caved in! I can't... I can't move my leg!
k9_kael_freed: Ha... Thanks, hero. Thought that was it for me. Never thought I'd be so glad to see your face.
k9_protag_save_aldric: Aldric! The tower is collapsing! Take my hand!
k9_aldric_tower_burns: My research... Decades of work... It's all burning. Everything is...
k9_aldric_saved: You... You chose my life over my books. No one has ever done that before.
k9_luna_healing: I can't stop healing... This child... They'll die in my arms if I stop...
k9_luna_saved: You protected us. Me and the wounded. I will be forever grateful for that.
k9_protag_regroup: Is... is everyone still alive? Please tell me everyone made it.
k9_aria_wounded: Alive... yes. But not unharmed. Some wounds run deeper than the ones you can see.
k9_kael_rage: Whoever did this... I SWEAR - they will pay for this. Every. Single. One.
k9_luna_cant_heal: My magic... is nearly spent. So many wounded. So much suffering. And I couldn't save them all.
k9_system_xaroth_detected: >>> Single entity detected. Dark energy: Extreme. Classification: Dark Mage. Threat level: Critical. This signature... it resembles Nihilus. But weaker. Much weaker.
k9_protag_xaroth_who: Show yourself! Who are you, and why did you destroy our home?!
k9_xaroth_intro: Your home? How touching. I am Xaroth. And this... was a demonstration. So you understand how meaningless your resistance truly is.
k9_aldric_power: That aura... This magic isn't from this world. It devours light itself. Careful - he's on a completely different level from anything we've faced.
k9_protag_decide: He's overpowering, but we can't just stand here. What do we do?
k9_choice_pursue: We hunt him down! He must not escape!
k9_choice_protect: The village first! The people need us more!
k9_protag_pursue: He's not getting away! Follow me - we corner him before he causes more damage!
k9_kael_with_you: Finally, someone talking sense! I'm in! This guy is going to regret showing up here!
k9_aria_pursue: Head over heart. If we find his weakness, we can end this. I'm analyzing his combat patterns.
k9_protag_protect: No. The people first. We don't leave anyone behind - that's what makes us who we are.
k9_luna_protect: Thank you. There are still so many who need help. Together we can save more.
k9_vex_defend: My forge is burning, but my hammer is still whole. Let those beasts come - old Vex will show them what steel we're made of!
k9_xaroth_flees: Not bad... You're stronger than expected. But it changes nothing. NOTHING.
k9_protag_xaroth_stop: Stop! Where are you going?! We're not done with you!
k9_xaroth_master: Oh, but I'm done with you. Enjoy the ashes. My master will find you... when the time is right.
k9_protag_ruins: Eldenrath... My God. It's... it's just gone. Everything we fought for.
k9_aria_crying: I... can't... All those memories. The market stalls. The laughing children. The fountain where we first met. All ashes.
k9_kael_revenge: Listen to me. All of you. This is not the end. This is the BEGINNING. The beginning of the end for this Xaroth and his damned master.
k9_luna_tears: I can feel the land's own pain. The earth weeps. So many souls released tonight...
k9_aldric_zeitriss: Time rift magic... If only I were strong enough... I could undo all of this. Turn back time. Before he came.
k9_luna_forbidden: No, Aldric! You must not even THINK that! Time magic is forbidden - it consumes the one who wields it! I've seen what it does to people!
k9_aldric_tempted: I know, Luna. I know. But... look around you. Look at what's become of our home. Tell me you wouldn't be tempted.
k9_system_aria_private: >>> [PRIVATE CHANNEL - ARIA ONLY] He has begun walking the path. The path of despair. The path that... leads to me. I didn't think it would happen so fast. I didn't think it would hurt so much to watch.
